description: An abstract painting composed of two envelope-like shapes joined together. The forms are filled with bold, saturated colors including red, yellow, blue, green, and orange, applied in layered horizontal stripes and organic curves. Within the shapes, suggestions of architectural forms — possibly an onion dome, trees, and pathways — are visible in a naive, decorative style. The outlines are thick and dark, with the colors filling compartmentalized sections. The overall effect is vibrant and playful.

_meta.title: 583 Two Envelopes on a Long Voyage
